Adaptive Gauss–\+Kronrod quadrature (QUADPACK driver routine DQAGE). 

Evaluates a real integral using adaptive Gauss–\+Kronrod rules over a finite interval.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em f} & Pointer to the function to integrate. \\
\hline
{\em a} & Lower integration bound. \\
\hline
{\em b} & Upper integration bound. \\
\hline
{\em epsabs} & Absolute accuracy requested. \\
\hline
{\em epsrel} & Relative accuracy requested. \\
\hline
{\em key} & Rule selection key (1–6 corresponding to different Gauss–\+Kronrod pairs). \\
\hline
{\em limit} & Maximum number of subintervals allowed. \\
\hline
{\em result} & Output integral result. \\
\hline
{\em abserr} & Estimated absolute error. \\
\hline
{\em neval} & Number of function evaluations performed. \\
\hline
{\em ier} & Error flag (0 if successful). \\
\hline
{\em alist} & Workspace array of left subinterval bounds. \\
\hline
{\em blist} & Workspace array of right subinterval bounds. \\
\hline
{\em rlist} & Workspace array of subinterval results. \\
\hline
{\em elist} & Workspace array of subinterval errors. \\
\hline
{\em iord} & Workspace array for ordering subintervals. \\
\hline
{\em last} & Number of subintervals actually used. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
